channel.title: Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Trends in Self-Management among Adults with Heart Failure from 2011 to 2016 Using the National Health and Nutrition Examination Surveys
The Spirituality Assessment Scale: Development and Validation
Tools for Assessment of Spirituality: A State of the Science
Current Status of Comorbidity, Medication Use, and Modifiable Lifestyle Among Adults with Heart Failure from 2011 to 2016 Using the National Health and Nutrition Examination Surveys
Trends in Psychological Well-being Across Adulthood in Lesbian, Gay, and Bisexual Population from 1995 to 2014 Using the Midlife in the United States Study
Nursing Education Research Conference 2020
item.description: Soyoung’s scholarly work entitled “A bibliometric analysis of simulation-based learning research in nursing education from 1996 to 2019,” has been selected for an oral presentation.

item.title: Nursing Theory Conference 2019
item.description: Oral Presentation; March 20-21, 2019; The Glidden House; Cleveland, OH (Pictures: Callista Roy and Peggy Chinn. With Korean nursing scholars)

item.title: Trends in Informal Caregiver Depression Research from 2000 to 2018: Combining Bibliometrics and Text Mining
Designing a Clinical Ethics Education Program for Nurses Based on the ADDIE model
Analysis of Caregiver Burden in Palliative Care: An Integrated Review
Effects of Nonpharmacological Interventions for Fatigue in Patients with Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
22nd HFSA Annual Scientific Meeting
item.description: Poster Presentation; September 15-18, 2018; Gaylord Opryland Hotel & Convention Center; Nashville Tennessee

item.title: Current Pharmacogenetic Approach for Oxaliplatin-induced Peripheral Neuropathy among Patients with Colorectal Cancer: A Systematic Review
Software Development: Ezpickr (JooYoung Seo & Soyoung Choi)
item.description: Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2019a). Ezpickr: Easy data import using gui file picker and seamless communication between an excel and r. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ezpickr

item.title: Software Development: Mboxr (JooYoung Seo & Soyoung Choi)
item.description: Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2019b). Mboxr: Reading, extracting, and converting an mbox file into a tibble. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mboxr
